template_module.title: GOV.UK Question Page Guidance Template
template_module.description: Template for summarising guidance on GOV.UK question pages. It instructs the assistant to consult the patterns reference module and provide guidance on when to use a question page, how to structure it, which components to include and important behaviours and accessibility considerations.

body.instruction: Look up the pattern named "{{pattern}}" in the GOV.UK patterns reference. Summarise the following points:

checklist.entry: How the pattern works, including page structure and components
Important behaviours such as asking one question per page, pre‑populating answers and preserving user input

body.instruction: For each point, include citations from the patterns or components reference modules. If the pattern is not defined, state that guidance is not yet available.
